A book reader for Even Realities G2 smart glasses. Browse and read free public domain books from Project Gutenberg – over 70,000 titles. Try it now Scan this QR code in the Even Realities app (Even Hub page) to use on your G2 glasses: System architecture [G2 glasses] <--BLE--> [Even app / simulator] <--HTTP--> [Gutendex API] \--- [Gutenberg.org (epub/text)] Book metadata comes from Gutendex , a free JSON API for the Project Gutenberg catalog. Epub and text files are fetched from gutenberg.org through a Vite proxy (in even-dev) that follows redirects server-side to avoid CORS. Note: Gutendex can be slow (5–20 seconds per request). This is on their server side and not something we can control. Popular books and topic queries are typically faster than sort-by-newest. App architecture g2/ index.ts App module registration main.ts Bridge connection + settings UI bootstrap state.ts App state singleton, bridge holder navigation.ts Stack-based menu navigation controller events.ts Event normalisation + screen-specific dispatch renderer.ts All screen rendering (menu, lists, chapters, reading) layout.ts Display constants + list pagination utility api.ts Gutendex API client (search, popular, new releases, topics) epub.ts Epub parser (JSZip + DOMParser, Gutenberg boilerplate filtering) paginator.ts Text word-wrap + page splitting with hyphenation favourites.ts localStorage favourites management types.ts Book, Chapter, GutenbergBook, state types ui.tsx React settings panel (search, favourites, connection) Data flow On startup the main menu is shown on the glasses. Selecting a category (Popular, New releases, Browse by topic) fetches books from Gutendex. Selecting a book fetches its epub from gutenberg.org, parses it with JSZip, extracts chapters from the XHTML spine, and paginates the text for the G2 display (60 chars x 9 lines). Gutenberg boilerplate (license,

, etc.) is automatically filtered out. Hypher for end-of-line hyphenation (en-us) Falls back to text/plain format if no epub is available Navigation Input Menu / list Chapter list Reading Tap Select item Open chapter – Double tap Go back Go back Go back Swipe down – Next chapter Next page Swipe up – Previous chapter Previous page Tech stack Book catalog: Gutendex (free, no API key) Epub parsing: JSZip + DOMParser Hyphenation: Hypher (en-us) G2 frontend: TypeScript + Even Hub SDK Settings UI: React + @jappyjan/even-realities-ui About books-even-g2.vercel.app Resources Readme Uh oh!
